summary: Updated seed.ts to rename special_instructions to owners_notes in the TypeScript layer. Changed: (1) SeedPet interface field from special_instructions to owners_notes, (2) all 7 pet object literal keys from special_instructions to owners_notes, (3) the INSERT parameter reference from pet.special_instructions to pet.owners_notes. The SQL INSERT column name in the query string (line 237) remains special_instructions as required by the spec. TypeScript compilation is clean.
notes_for_reviewer: The SQL INSERT column list on line 237 intentionally still reads 'special_instructions' — this is the database column name and must not change.
All 7 pet objects had their keys renamed via replace_all; verified by reading the file after edits.
